title: Immibis's Peripherals
body:
This mod adds the following additional peripherals to ComputerCraft:

* RFID cards - cards whose data is readable from within a nearby player's inventory,
* Mag-Cards - similar to RFID cards, but larger and rewritable, while requiring physical contact to read,
* Speaker - a peripheral that plays square waves,
* LAN cables - allows connecting computers over any distance,
* Cryptographic Accelerator - provides encryption and decryption APIs,
* Adventure Map Interface - lets your computer programs edit the world.

The full API documentation is available on [the ComputerCraft forums](http://www.computercraft.info/forums2/index.php?/topic/3728-mc-1710-cc-165-immibiss-peripherals/).

(Original mod by immibis.)

## Archival notice

**This mod is abandoned and has been uploaded for archival purposes. It was originally created by [immibis](http://immibis.com/mcmoddl/). It has been uploaded to Modrinth under the ModrinthArchives account with permission from the original author.**

![Discord screenshot showing permission to upload](https://cdn.modrinth.com/archives/immibis-permission.png)
